music.prompt: Clean, modern ambient background music, light percussion, warm bass, no vocals, professional tech product feel

cue.label: Kanban Overview
cue.voice: Tracking project context usually means wrestling with external systems like Jira or Trello.
It forces a context switch and creates a coordination headache, especially when AI coding agents and human developers are trying to collaborate on the same codebase.

cue.label: Git Synchronization
cue.voice: Kanbus eliminates this friction by embedding project management directly within your repository.
Because everything is stored as plain files, your project management shares the same version control as your code, giving you a clear, timestamped paper trail.

cue.label: Agent-Ready CLI
cue.voice: The agent-ready CLI lets you create, update, and move work from your terminal without leaving repository-native workflows.

cue.label: Jira Synchronization
cue.voice: Jira synchronization brings existing Jira projects into the repo so agents and humans work from the same source of truth.

cue.label: Local Tasks
cue.voice: Local tasks let you draft privately and promote to the shared board only when work is ready for team visibility.

cue.label: Virtual Projects
cue.voice: Virtual projects aggregate cross-repository execution into a single view for planning and delivery coordination.

cue.label: Beads Compatibility
cue.voice: Beads compatibility lets you open existing data immediately and evolve your process incrementally while teams keep shipping.

cue.label: VS Code Plugin
cue.voice: The VS Code plugin lets you inspect and update board state without context switching away from the files you are editing.

cue.label: Integrated Wiki
cue.voice: The integrated wiki renders current issue lists inside docs so plans, status updates, and execution context stay synchronized.

cue.label: Policy as Code
cue.voice: Policy as code lets you define standards once and apply them consistently across CLI usage, automation, and collaborative workflows.

cue.label: Lifecycle Hooks
cue.voice: Lifecycle hooks let projects pull external logic at command boundaries, with policy guidance aligned in the same execution model.

cue.label: Get Started
cue.voice: Install Kanbus, connect your repository, and run the same board workflow for humans and AI agents.
